privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the task uses synthetically generated data to pre-populate JStock watchlists and portfolios (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA). Validated that the explicit task requirements for deposit (amount 2000.0, date Mar 31, 2024, comment 'Q1 2024 Savings') and buy transaction (AAPL, 10 units, price 170.0, date Mar 31, 2024) exactly align with the task description, metadata, and verifier logic. Confirmed the expected export path matches export_result.sh parameters.
